series_title: น้องช้างจอมพลังแห่งความดี
episode_title: ช้างน้อยและภารกิจเก็บตุ๊กตา
character_outfit: cute cartoon patterned blue pajamas with bear and star prints

storyboard.image_prompt: An adorable baby anthropomorphic elephant (Little Chang), standing on two legs, human-like hands with fingers. Wearing cute blue cartoon patterned pajamas. Sitting on messy wooden floor, surrounded by many scattered stuffed animals. A TV is on in the background. Cinematic lighting, soft glow. Vertical 9:16.
storyboard.video_prompt: Little Chang the baby elephant is sitting on the floor, surrounded by a mess of toys. He looks around with large eyes, moving his trunk slightly. (Little Chang: "ทำไมตุ๊กตาเต็มไปหมดเลยนะ?")
storyboard.thai_dialogue: ช้างน้อย: (พูดกับตัวเอง) "ทำไมตุ๊กตาเต็มไปหมดเลยนะ?"

storyboard.image_prompt: Little Chang, baby anthropomorphic elephant (fixed identity), wearing cartoon patterned pajamas, looking confused. A tall shadow (Mom's) is approaching. Empty colorful toy basket visible nearby. Vertical 9:16.
storyboard.video_prompt: Mom (only legs visible) enters. Little Chang looks up, his large elephant ears twitching curiously. (Mom: "ช้างน้อยคะ วันนี้เราต้องช่วยกันเก็บของเล่นนะ")
storyboard.thai_dialogue: แม่: (นอกเฟรม) "ช้างน้อยคะ วันนี้เราต้องช่วยกันเก็บของเล่นให้หมดนะ"

storyboard.image_prompt: Close-up on Little Chang's face (baby elephant identity), looking up with large innocent eyes, smiling. Wearing cartoon patterned pajamas. Soft grey skin texture. Vertical 9:16.
storyboard.video_prompt: Little Chang looks up at his mother, smiling and lifting his trunk in determination. (Little Chang: "โอเคครับแม่ ผมจะเป็นฮีโร่เก็บตุ๊กตา!")
storyboard.thai_dialogue: ช้างน้อย: (ยิ้มกว้าง) "โอเคครับแม่ ผมจะเป็นฮีโร่เก็บตุ๊กตา!"

storyboard.image_prompt: Little Chang (baby elephant) stands on two legs in the center of the messy room, wearing cartoon patterned pajamas. Toy basket behind him. Taking a deep breath. Vertical 9:16.
storyboard.video_prompt: Little Chang stands amidst the toys. He takes a deep breath, puffs out his cheeks, and waves his human-like hands, ready to begin. (Little Chang: "อึ๊บ! เริ่มภารกิจ!")
storyboard.thai_dialogue: ช้างน้อย: (หายใจเข้าลึกๆ) "อึ๊บ! เริ่มภารกิจ!"

storyboard.image_prompt: Little Chang (baby elephant) kneeling on the floor, wearing cartoon patterned pajamas. Using his five-fingered hands to pick up a small toy and place it in the basket. Bright, warm lighting. Vertical 9:16.
storyboard.video_prompt: Little Chang crawls slightly, using his trunk and hands to toss toys into the basket quickly. (Little Chang: "นี่แน่ะ! หนึ่ง สอง สาม สี่...")
storyboard.thai_dialogue: ช้างน้อย: (เก็บตุ๊กตาอย่างรวดเร็ว) "นี่แน่ะ! หนึ่ง สอง สาม สี่..."

storyboard.image_prompt: Close-up on Little Chang (baby elephant) with intense focus, wearing pajamas. He is using both hands to lift a giant stuffed lion that is almost his size. Vertical 9:16.
storyboard.video_prompt: Little Chang tries to lift a large stuffed lion, pulling it with both hands. His little elephant tail wiggles with effort. (Little Chang: "ฮึบ! ช้างตัวใหญ่อ่ะ!")
storyboard.thai_dialogue: ช้างน้อย: (พยายามยกตุ๊กตาตัวใหญ่) "ฮึบ! ตัวใหญ่อ่ะ!"

storyboard.image_prompt: Wide shot of the room, getting tidier. Little Chang (baby elephant), wearing pajamas, is pushing the large stuffed lion across the floor toward the basket. Vertical 9:16.
storyboard.video_prompt: Little Chang uses his whole body to push the big lion, sliding it across the floor. (Little Chang: "อึดๆ... อีกนิดเดียว...")
storyboard.thai_dialogue: ช้างน้อย: (ดันตุ๊กตา) "อึดๆ... อีกนิดเดียว..."

storyboard.image_prompt: Low-angle shot, Little Chang (baby elephant), wearing pajamas, on hands and knees reaching under a wooden bookshelf. Curious expression. Vertical 9:16.
storyboard.video_prompt: Little Chang sees a blue rabbit doll under the shelf. He reaches in with his trunk and his little hand. (Little Chang: "อ๊ะ! น้องกระต่ายไปอยู่ตรงนั้นเอง!")
storyboard.thai_dialogue: ช้างน้อย: (สังเกตเห็นตุ๊กตาตัวโปรด) "อ๊ะ! น้องกระต่ายไปอยู่ตรงนั้นเอง!"

storyboard.image_prompt: Little Chang (baby elephant) holding the blue rabbit doll close to his cheek with his trunk and hand, wearing pajamas. Walking to the full basket. Vertical 9:16.
storyboard.video_prompt: Little Chang hugs the rabbit doll with his trunk and proudly places it on top of the pile in the basket. (Little Chang: "กลับบ้านกันนะน้องรัก...")
storyboard.thai_dialogue: ช้างน้อย: (กอดตุ๊กตา) "กลับบ้านกันนะน้องรัก..."

storyboard.image_prompt: The room is clean. Little Chang (baby elephant), wearing pajamas, jumps into his mother's arms. Full toy basket in the corner. Warm, happy cinematic lighting. Vertical 9:16.
storyboard.video_prompt: Mom (human) kneels and opens her arms. Little Chang runs on two legs and jumps into a tight embrace. (Little Chang: "เย้! ผมทำความดีสำเร็จแล้ว!")
storyboard.thai_dialogue: ช้างน้อย: (กอดแม่) "เย้! ผมทำความดีสำเร็จแล้ว!"
